response.original_title: 最愛のIカップ妻が中年男の欲望に溺れる本格NTRー。 町内キャンプNTR テントの中でまわされた妻の衝撃的寝取られ映像
response.overview: Six months after my wife Rena and I moved to this area, we came to the campsite with only five other people: the town chairman Sugiura, the vice-chairman Otsuka, and the treasurer Kashiwagi. We had initially been told that everyone would be coming... but the chairman and the others were chatting while lecherously staring at my wife's body. My wife didn't notice at all and was chatting with them, which made me incredibly angry, so I ended up arguing with her. The vice-chairman told me that I should drink to calm down, so I got drunk. In my hazy state of mind, the last thing I remember is my wife being embraced by the chairman and going into the tent together...
response.title: 最愛のIカップ妻が中年男の欲望に溺れる本格NTRー。 町内キャンプNTR テントの中でまわされた妻の衝撃的寝取られ映像
